suggestions.label: Core C++ basics
suggestions.text: Explain C++ compilation, headers, namespaces, and the build process.

suggestions.label: Classes and OOP
suggestions.text: Explain classes, constructors, destructors, and the Rule of Three/Five.

suggestions.label: Memory management
suggestions.text: How does memory management work in C++? Explain the heap, stack, and RAII.

suggestions.label: Templates
suggestions.text: Explain C++ templates, template specialisation, and generic programming.

suggestions.label: Move semantics
suggestions.text: Explain rvalue references, move semantics, and perfect forwarding.

suggestions.label: STL containers
suggestions.text: Explain the Standard Template Library containers: vector, map, set, deque, list.

suggestions.label: STL algorithms
suggestions.text: How do I use STL algorithms like sort, find, transform, and accumulate?

suggestions.label: Smart pointers
suggestions.text: Explain unique_ptr, shared_ptr, and weak_ptr with examples.

suggestions.label: Concurrency
suggestions.text: How do I write multithreaded C++ using std::thread, mutex, and condition variables?

suggestions.label: Modern C++
suggestions.text: What are the key features of C++11/14/17/20 and how do I use them?

suggestions.label: Design patterns
suggestions.text: Explain common C++ design patterns: CRTP, PIMPL, Factory, Singleton.

suggestions.label: Testing
suggestions.text: How do I write unit tests in C++ with Google Test or Catch2?

suggestions.label: Error handling
suggestions.text: Explain C++ exception handling, noexcept, and error management strategies.

suggestions.label: Debugging
suggestions.text: How do I debug C++ programs using GDB, Valgrind, and AddressSanitizer?

suggestions.label: Practice
suggestions.text: Give me an advanced C++ coding challenge to solve.
